recipe.title: Thursday: White Chicken Chili with Jalapeño Cornbread
ingredients: • 2 cans (15 oz) great northern beans, drained
• 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp oregano, 1/2 tsp garlic powder, salt/pepper
• 1 box (8.5 oz) cornbread mix, 1 egg, 1/2 cup buttermilk
• Sour cream, cilantro, lime wedges to serve
steps: Combine chicken, beans, corn, chiles, broth, spices in Dutch oven. Bring to simmer. Cook 15 min. Stir in cream, simmer 5 more min.|Preheat oven to 400°F. Make cornbread batter per box (egg + buttermilk). Fold in 3/4 cheddar and half the jalapeño.|Pour chili into oven-safe dish. Top with cornbread batter, remaining cheddar and jalapeños.|Bake 20–25 min until golden and set. Rest 5 min. Serve with sour cream, cilantro, lime.
